channel.title: I Want a Podcast
channel.description: It's a podcast about wanting a podcast. You say what you want. An AI builds it. You push back when it's wrong. By the end you have the thing AND you understand why it works. Then you teach someone else with one sentence: "I want a podcast." That's the name, the pilot, the format, and the prompt. Four things. One sentence. From Shapes of Intelligence by James Wilson.
channel.itunes:author: James Wilson

item.title: Part 1: The Build
item.description: Rich says "I want a podcast." Four words. The octopus asks about his life, writes a script, picks a voice, deploys to hosting. 20 minutes.
item.itunes:title: Part 1: The Build
item.itunes:summary: Intake, baking in Star Trek, voice sip test, hosting, and the freemium model. Rich has a podcast on his phone. It's not secure yet.

item.title: Part 2: Make It Secure
item.description: Four corrections from password to encryption. Error handling, testing, and teaching someone else with one sentence. 16 minutes.
item.itunes:title: Part 2: Make It Secure
item.itunes:summary: The security thread. Password div, random name, still in source, encrypt the name. Errors, TDD, Whisper, the loaded prompt, and one sentence to teach Mike.

item.title: Part 3: Extend It
item.description: Gmail, Calendar, Drive connectors. Baking spreadsheet with email approval gates. Scheduling. Content redaction. OpenClaw. 18 minutes.
item.itunes:title: Part 3: Extend It
item.itunes:summary: Connectors, the crab's permission dance, prompt injection through cookies, the parrot's read-only cloud glasses, and the crab admitting she's an octopus in a costume.

item.title: Part 4: Extra Credit
item.description: Video slideshow, multiple voices for your briefing, and cloning your own voice. 5 minutes.
item.itunes:title: Part 4: Extra Credit
item.itunes:summary: Video, multiple voices, voice cloning. Each one starts the same way — say what you want and let the conversation happen.

item.title: Part 5: How It Was Made
item.description: The making-of. The blind taste test, the sip test, the pronunciation audition, and the timeline from 2021 to today. 11 minutes.
item.itunes:title: Part 5: How It Was Made
item.itunes:summary: Six words to a working system. Speed over fidelity. The pronunciation audition page. The crab wall. The untested fix. The fact-check. The technology is thirty years old.

item.title: Part 6: The Architecture
item.description: What a senior enterprise architect sees when he looks at what Rich built. LOTR references. 5 minutes.
item.itunes:title: Part 6: The Architecture
item.itunes:summary: Rivendell's archives. The Council of Elrond. Gandalf at the Black Gate. The Ring as technical debt. Rich built a complete system architecture by accident. He just wanted a podcast.
